title: Fix admin blog post save and publish functionality

requirements.summary: Fix the CreateBlogPostPage form submission to correctly call the backend createPost mutation, handle responses, and navigate on success
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the Create Blog Post form invokes the backend createPost mutation.
On success, the user is redirected to the AdminPostsPage.
On failure, a visible error message is displayed to the admin.

file_operations.description: Fix the form submission handler to properly await the createPost mutation, pass all required parameters including the isPublished checkbox state, handle the returned post ID, display error messages in the UI on failure, and navigate to /admin/posts on success using the router's navigate function.

Review and fix the useCreatePost mutation hook to ensure it correctly passes all parameters to actor.createPost (including id, title, slug, category, content, excerpt, readTime, author, tags, image, imageSize, contentImages, isPublished, publishedAt), returns the post ID from the mutation, handles ExternalBlob serialization, and properly invalidates the 'posts' query cache on success.

requirements.summary: Fix the AdminPostsPage publish button and CreateBlogPostPage publish checkbox to correctly invoke backend publish/unpublish mutations and reflect updated state in the UI
acceptanceCriteria: The publish/unpublish button on AdminPostsPage triggers the correct mutation.
The post's status updates optimistically or refetches after the mutation completes.
The publish checkbox on CreateBlogPostPage correctly sets the post's initial published state.

file_operations.description: Fix the publish/unpublish button click handler to correctly call the setPublishedState mutation with the post ID, the toggled isPublished boolean, and the appropriate publishedDate (Date.now() when publishing, null when unpublishing). Ensure the mutation result triggers a query refetch or optimistic update to reflect the new published state in the UI immediately.

Review and fix the useSetPublishedState mutation hook to ensure it correctly invokes actor.setPublishedState with id, isPublished boolean, and publishedDate (bigint or null), handles the boolean return value, properly invalidates both 'posts' and 'publishedPosts' query caches on success, and exposes error states for UI display.

Ensure the publish checkbox value is correctly bound to the form state and passed as the isPublished parameter when calling the createPost mutation. If the checkbox is checked, also pass Date.now() as publishedAt; otherwise pass null.
